requirement: Buyer can create a sourcing event (RFI, RFQ, RFP, Auction) for approved suppliers.
Supplier can participate in sourcing events via email and the Coupa Supplier Portal (CSP).
Sourcing events can be configured with timelines, evaluations, scoring, and award decisions.
Approval workflows aligned with Limits of Authority (DOA / LOA) are supported.
Savings tracking (planned, negotiated, cost avoidance) is supported.
Reporting capabilities provide actionable insights into sourcing events, supplier performance, and spend data.
Roles and responsibilities are clearly defined for sourcing activities.
Category Managers/Procurement team can initiate and manage strategic sourcing activities for centre-managed commodities and services.
Buyers can create purchase requests that can be 'flipped' into sourcing events to streamline supplier engagement and ensure competitive pricing.
Users can conduct RFx events, including RFI, RFP, and RFQ, in Coupa sourcing module.
Users can conduct auctions, including English reverse auction, Dutch reverse auction, and Japanese reverse auction, in Coupa sourcing module.
Users can define and track savings in Coupa sourcing module.
Coupa Admins can customize sourcing settings and configurations to enable controls at the Buyer side.
